author: gb9t
content: Iter 56 result: kernel/rcu/srcu.md (Sleepable-RCU - srcutree.c ~2203 + srcu.h + srcutree.h; per-domain srcu_struct + per-CPU lock/unlock counters per-idx + two-flip GP discipline + per-CPU cb_list + KVM memslot use-case rationale) + virt/kvm/x86-pmu.md (KVM architectural PMU - pmu.c ~1407 + pmu.h + vmx/pmu_intel.c ~850 + svm/pmu.c ~286; per-vCPU virtual PMC + per-PMC host perf_event backing + PMI delivery + RDPMC pass-through + vendor MSR dispatch + CPUID.0x0A enumeration). 62 Tier-3s total. Next iter: kernel/sched/fair.md (CFS scheduler in detail) + virt/kvm/x86-irq.md (KVM in-kernel IRQ chip dispatch).
